_comments.safety: Every check ships in 'alert' mode. The agent only WATCHES until you change a mode to 'ask' (queue for your approval) or 'auto' (act on its own). Nothing is auto-fixed by default.
_comments.disk_auto: Set checks.disk.mode to 'auto' only after you trust cleanup_globs. The agent deletes regular files older than cleanup_older_than_days inside those globs only, never directories, never symlinks, never system paths.
_comments.service_auto: Set checks.service.mode to 'auto' to let the agent restart a failed service in the allowlist. Use 'ask' if you'd rather approve each restart.
_comments.process_note: The process check NEVER kills automatically in v1, even if set to 'auto' (it is clamped to 'ask'). It flags the single largest memory user above the threshold.
_comments.checkin: Set checkin.endpoint_url to your AgentPulse backend /api/agent/checkin URL and checkin.auth_token to the API token generated by agentpulse-backend create-api-key. Disabled when endpoint_url is empty.
